overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage inside a cozy, dimly lit medieval tavern (The Three Broomsticks). The player character stands observing the rustic wooden interior with NPCs visible on the upper balcony, illuminated by warm firelight and wall sconces. The clip ends with the character raising their hand to interact.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval tavern interior with upper balcony and fireplace

events.description: player character raises right hand toward the bar area, possibly to cast a spell or interact

agents.ego_description: standing near the entrance observing the tavern interior, then raising hand to interact

notable_agents.action: two figures standing on the upper balcony overlooking the main floor
figure seated at the bar near the fireplace

entered.detail: illuminated wooden sign with gold lettering above the arched doorway
rustic wooden railing on the upper level with vertical posts
large stone archway with glowing fire inside, providing warm ambient light
simple wooden tavern tables and benches scattered throughout the floor
medieval-style wall-mounted torches providing warm orange lighting
several framed portraits hanging on the wooden wall to the right
large circular iron chandelier hanging from the ceiling beams

segments.scene_description: The player stands in the entrance of The Three Broomsticks tavern, a cozy medieval interior with dark wooden beams, a glowing stone fireplace, and warm wall sconces. Two NPCs stand on the upper balcony while another sits at the bar. The scene remains static until the character raises their hand toward the end, suggesting an interaction or spell-casting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a steady observation of a cozy medieval tavern interior that culminates in a sudden gesture of interaction. It begins with the camera positioned at the entrance of The Three Broomsticks, surveying a rustic space defined by dark wooden beams and the warm glow of wall sconces. As the gaze lingers, the flickering light from a stone fireplace illuminates the scene, highlighting NPCs stationed on an upper balcony and another seated at the bar. The stillness of the environment persists until the camera's focus shifts slightly as the character finally raises their hand to initiate a spell or interaction.
